testcase.name: calcularCostoMatriculaEstandar
testcase.system-out: --- TEST 1: Costo Matricula Estandar --- Estudiante: Ana | Curso: Matemáticas Creditos: 3 x S/100.0 = S/300.0 Descuento: NO Costo final: S/300.0 [OK] Estado: Activa [OK]
testcase.system-err: WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\goku6\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.14.4\byte-buddy-agent-1.14.4.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

testcase.name: retiroDentroDe7DiasDevuelve70porciento
testcase.system-out: --- TEST 3: Retiro Dentro de 7 Dias --- Estudiante: Carlos | Curso: Introducción al Derecho Retiro en dia 5: Valido (dentro de 7 dias) Costo: S/600.0 -> Devolucion 70%: S/420.0 [OK] Estado: Retirada [OK]

testcase.name: pruebaIntegralMatricula
testcase.system-out: --- TEST 4: Flujo Integral Matricula --- Estudiante: María | Curso: Anatomía Paso 1: Crear matricula -> Costo: S/360.0 Estado: Retirada [OK] Paso 2: Retiro dia 3 -> Devolucion 70%: S/251.99999999999997 [OK] Flujo completo: APROBADO

testcase.name: descuentoPorCreditosMayoresOIgual5
testcase.system-out: --- TEST 2: Descuento por Creditos (>=5) --- Estudiante: Luis | Curso: Proyecto Avanzado Base: 5 x S/200.0 = S/1000.0 Descuento: SI (5% por >= 5 creditos) Final: S/950.0 [OK]
